svg.title: GlobalMart Sitemap
svg.desc: Information architecture sitemap showing GlobalMart's page hierarchy: public pages, authenticated pages, and admin panel

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the GlobalMart home page')
sendPrompt('What pages are public in GlobalMart?')
sendPrompt('What pages require login in GlobalMart?')
sendPrompt('What does the GlobalMart admin panel include?')
sendPrompt('What should be on the GlobalMart landing page?')
sendPrompt('What features should the product listing page have?')
sendPrompt('What should the login and register pages include?')
sendPrompt('What is the product detail page?')
sendPrompt('What is the search results page?')
sendPrompt('How does price comparison work across currencies?')
sendPrompt('How does logistics estimate work on product pages?')
sendPrompt('What should the user dashboard show?')
sendPrompt('What should the shopping cart and checkout include?')
sendPrompt('What should the order history page show?')
sendPrompt('What should the payment simulation checkout look like?')
sendPrompt('How should logistics tracking work in GlobalMart?')
sendPrompt('What should the account settings page include?')
sendPrompt('What does product management look like in the Django admin?')
sendPrompt('What does order management look like in the Django admin?')
sendPrompt('What does user management look like in the Django admin?')
